headline: FedEx Corp (FDX)’s Stock Is Up After Jim Cramer Didn’t Hold Back With The Praise
summary: We recently published Jim Cramer’s Biggest Winners to Buy: Top 20 AI & Other Stocks He Got Right in 2026. FedEx Corp (NYSE:FDX) is one of the stocks discussed by Jim Cramer. Logistics giant FedEx Corp (NYSE:FDX)’s shares are up by 61% over the past year and by 32% year-to-date. Cramer has discussed the firm […]
